summary: Added 'Board setup required' guidance to agt init completion output explaining that 'Pending Approval' and 'Ready' columns must be added manually to the GitHub project board before using agt run. Added a 'Prerequisites' section to agt help run with the same information, including instructions to record Option IDs in PROJECT.md. Added two tests to cli-commands.test.mjs verifying the new help text appears in agt help run output.
